title: Robotan
desc: Robotan, a robot from outer space, visits Earth and makes friends with a young boy. Whenever his new friend gets in trouble or goes on an adventure, Robotan is on hand to help.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Ninjutsu Academy is visited by Hyougo Daisankyoueimaru who is seeking help since Onigumomaru has been abducted. As a result, the trio and Rikichi set out to find him.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: When the headmaster dreams of innumerable ninja pursuing him, he directs his ninjas to investigate and tighten security around the academy.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: The dokutamas are brought to Ninjutsu Academy by Makaino. Later, Yamada sensei is asked to adopt the guise of Denko-san.

desc: Youkan that was stored by Shinbei appears to have disappeared and despite investigations, even Rantarou and Kirimaru appear to know nothing of it.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Naruto returns stronger to face deadly foes, save his friends, and fulfill his destiny in this action-packed anime journey filled with loyalty, growth, and ninja values.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: The Keroro Platoon appoints Dororo to earn money by teaching ninja skills to children. However, they are forced to think of a new idea after no students show up.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: While Sumomo and Keroro use hidden cameras, Natsumi goes on a frog-stomping rampage.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Sergeant Frog plans an invasion, but his comrades are preoccupied as they get caught up in the festive spirit of Christmas.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Sgt Frog eagerly helps prepare for New Year celebrations with his friends. However, he realises too late that he has forgotten to complete his assigned homework.

desc: A group of alien frog invaders attempt to conquer Earth. However, they struggle to make their plans come to fruition and encounter various troubles.

title: Black Clover
desc: In the Clover Kingdom, where every person knows magic, orphans Asta and Yuno strive to become the Wizard King, the greatest magic user. However, Asta knows no magic, while Yuno harnesses huge talent.

title: Black Clover
desc: Yuno receives a legendary grimoire with a four-leaf clover. When a dacoit named Revchi comes to steal it, Asta comes to Yuno's rescue.

title: Black Clover
desc: Asta and Yuno spend six months training for the upcoming Magic Knights Entrance Exam. Everyone thinks Yuno is sure to pass, but worries that Asta is simply wasting his time.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: An explosive appears out of nowhere when Rantarou and the others are cleaning. Meanwhile, Ikeda Saburouji senpai has been training.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Yamabuki pays a visit to Yuki, Tomomi and Oshige to savor the delicious dishes in the Dining Hall Lady's. Nonetheless, the Dining Hall Lady had to unexpectedly leave for a business trip that day.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou, a young boy who wants to be a ninja, goes to a special school, where he makes friends and engages in a number of misadventures.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Whilst returning to Ninjutsu Academy, Sanjirou and Isuke lose their way in the forest. As they try to find an exit, they happen upon an isolated house.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Yuki and her friends are assigned the task of following Rantaro, Kirimaru and Shinbei as homework. However, they feel that the task at hand is too easy.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Although disguised as Fuwa Raizou, Hachiya Sabrou is spotted by Rantarou and the others whilst deciding on what he should have for lunch.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: After learning of a secret basement from Happousai, Ibuki visits Ninjutsu Academy. Meanwhile, Rantarou and the others investigate the rumour.

title: Naruto: Shippuden
desc: Naruto, in his four-tailed form, battles fiercely against Orochimaru. Meanwhile, Kabuto confronts Sakura and Yamato, as they witness the terrifying transformation of their comrade.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: A group of alien frog invaders attempt to conquer Earth. However, they struggle to make their plans come to fruition and encounter various troubles.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: The Keroro Platoon stages its own version of the Winter Olympics.

title: Sergeant Keroro
desc: Keroro schemes to conquer Earth using sweet potato dumplings. However, the infatuated humans focus entirely on cocoa treats instead.

title: Black Clover
desc: Asta and Yuno go to the colosseum in the royal capital for the Magic Knights Exam.

title: Black Clover
desc: The entrance exam concludes and the team captains choose the candidates for their squads.

title: Black Clover
desc: In order to become a member of the Black Bulls squad, Asta must go through with a strange hazing ritual. Meanwhile, the Golden Dawn meet with Yuno.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: After the fall of Hodo Hodo Castle within a night 70 years ago, a rumour begins to spread that the castle grounds are haunted by spiritual malevolence.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Investigations are conducted by Rantarou and the others after they arrive at the Hodo Hodo Castle. Later, they observe a mysterious light.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Whilst Zatto and Hama Shuichirou have occupied the Hodo Hodo Castle together, a group of ninjas plans an invasion of the castle.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Rantarou and the others pick passwords to impede trespassers before heading out to patrol the area at night in groups of two.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Whilst a battle ensues between Zatto and Kema at Hodo Hodo Castle, Rantarou and Sanjirou use a water jar to pick up on sounds from the ground.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Desiring to see Rikichi at work, Kanzaki senpai and Tsugiya senpai ask for permission from Yamada sensei to leave. However, they are forbidden.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: When the Dokutake ninjas try invading an enemy castle, their efforts are rendered fruitless. As a result, Hieta Happousai tries to abate his lord's anger.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Denshichi and Sakichi are met by bandits whilst trying to cross the bridge. Afterwards, they are robbed of their belongings.

title: Ninjaboy Rantaro
desc: Doi sensei abruptly announces a mathematical examination which leaves the classroom ambience chaotic. Meanwhile, Kirimaru is confident of his success.

desc: Naruto Uzumaki, a headstrong adolescent who seeks approval and acceptance, trains to overcome various challenges and become the village Hokage.
